title: A storage box for storing medicines
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a storage box (1) for storing medicines. The storage box (1) comprises a housing (20) defined by a base member (10), a peripheral side wall (11) which extends from the base member, and a lid (2) provided over the peripheral side wall (11). The storage box (1) includes a plurality of compartments (3, 4, 5, 6, 7) defined in the housing (20). Each of the plurality of compartments (3, 4, 5, 6, 7) is adapted to store at least one medicine. Further, the storage box (1) includes at least one indication unit (100) associated with each of the plurality of compartments (3, 4, 5, 6, 7) and removably connectable to the at least one medicine. Each of the at least one indication unit (100) is configured to alert a user to consume the medicine at predefined intervals of time.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS: 1. A storage box (1) for storing medicines, the storage box (1) comprising: a housing (20) defined by a base member (10), a peripheral side wall (11) extending from the base member, and a lid (2) provided over the peripheral side wall (11); a plurality of compartments (3, 4, 5, 6, 7) defined in the housing (20), each of the plurality of compartments (3, 4, 5, 6, 7) is adapted to store at least one medicine; at least one indication unit (100) associated with each of the plurality of compartments (3, 4, 5, 6, 7) and removably connectable to the at least one medicine, wherein, each of the at least one indication unit (100) is configured to alert a user to consume the medicine at predefined intervals of time. 2. The storage box (1) as claimed in claim 1, wherein the medicines are packed in at least one of sheets (11) and in lidded containers (14). 3. The storage box (1) as claimed in claim 1, wherein the at least one indication unit (100) is configured as a clip unit to fix on to the at least one sheet (11) packed with the medicines. 4. The storage box (1) as claimed in claim 1, wherein the at least one indication unit (100) is configured on a lid of the lidded container (14) packed with the medicine. 5. The storage box (1) as claimed in claim 1, wherein the indication unit (100) is at least one of a visual indicator (13) and an audio indicator (16). 6. The storage box (1) as claimed in claim 5, wherein at least one visual indicator (13) is positioned on the peripheral wall of the housing (20) and on top of each of the plurality of compartments (3, 4, 5, 6, 7) to visually alert the user at predefined intervals of time. 7. The storage box (1) as claimed in claim 5, wherein the at least one audio indicator (16) is positioned on the housing (20) and on top of each of the plurality of 

 compartments (3, 4, 5, 6, 7) to provide an audio indication to the user at predefined intervals of time. 8. The storage box (1) as claimed in claim 1, wherein the at least one indication unit (100) is pre-configured with alert timings for indication based on prescriptions by a medical practitioner. 9. The storage box (1) as claimed in claim 1, wherein the at least one indication unit (100) comprises a control unit and a magnetic reader for pre-configuring the predefined intervals of time. 10. The storage box (1) as claimed in claim 1, wherein the peripheral side wall (11), and a lid (2) are transparent. 11. The storage box (1) as claimed in claim 1, wherein the plurality of compartments (3, 4, 5, 6, 7) are defined by positioning one or more partition walls (9) in the housing (20).
